text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Trainer Kiryuin and Trainer Kashimoto are two of
my colleagues at the academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I speak to them about their respective partners
and how much faith they have in them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We wish each other luck at the end of our
passionate discussion, and I find that my belief in
<chrname> is even stronger now!
